channel.title: Rx Shortage Radar - To Be Discontinued
channel.description: Latest public FDA drug shortage records with status To Be Discontinued from openFDA.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Dehydrated Alcohol Injection, Solution (16729-710-45)
item.description: Dehydrated Alcohol, Injection, Solution, 1 mL/1 mL (10 pack) (NDC 16729-710-45) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-05-27 Company: Accord Healthcare Inc. Accord is transitioning to the 5-pack configuration (NDC 16729-710-53).

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Alteplase Injection (50242-085-27)
item.description: Activase, Injection, 1 KIT in 1 CARTON (50242-085-27) * 100 mL in 1 VIAL, SINGLE-USE * 100 mL in 1 VIAL, SINGLE USE (NDC 50242-085-27) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-05-21 Company: Genentech, Inc Discontinuation of the 100mg vial configuration

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Gadoterate Meglumine Injection (65219-080-05)
item.description: Gadoterate Meglumine, Injection, 376.9 mg/1 mL (NDC 65219-080-05) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-05-21 Company: Jiangsu Hengrui Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Gadoterate Meglumine Injection (65219-082-10)
item.description: Gadoterate Meglumine, Injection, 376.9 mg/1 mL (NDC 65219-082-10) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-05-21 Company: Jiangsu Hengrui Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Gadoterate Meglumine Injection (65219-084-15)
item.description: Gadoterate Meglumine, Injection, 376.9 mg/1 mL (NDC 65219-084-15) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-05-21 Company: Jiangsu Hengrui Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Gadoterate Meglumine Injection (65219-086-20)
item.description: Gadoterate Meglumine, Injection, 376.9 mg/1 mL (NDC 65219-086-20) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-05-21 Company: Jiangsu Hengrui Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Iron Sucrose Injection (67457-957-99)
item.description: Iron Sucrose, Injection, 50 mg/2.5 mL (NDC 67457-957-99) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-05-21 Company: Mylan Institutional, a Viatris Company A business decision has been made to discontinue of 2.5mL presentation only. Continuity of supply is forecasted across all other presentations of Iron Sucrose: 67457-639-10 Iron Sucrose 20mg/mL 10mL SDV 5PK 67457-638-10 Iron Sucrose 20mg/mL 5mL SDV 10PK 67457-638-25 Iron Sucrose 20mg/mL 5mL SDV 25PK.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Activated Charcoal Oral Suspension (0574-0520-74)
item.description: Actidose, Oral Suspension, 208 mg/1 mL (NDC 0574-0520-74) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-05-15 Company: Padagis US LLC Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.description: Actidose, Oral Suspension, 208 mg/1 mL (NDC 0574-0520-76) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-05-15 Company: Padagis US LLC Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.description: Actidose Aqua, Oral Suspension, 208 mg/1 mL (NDC 0574-0521-25) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-05-15 Company: Padagis US LLC Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.description: Liraglutide, Injection, 6 mg/1 mL (NDC 0480-7250-46) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-05-14 Company: Teva Pharmaceuticals USA, Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.description: Exelderm, Solution, 1.0% 5 mL (NDC 69489-721-05) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-05-08 Company: Journey Medical Corporation Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.description: Exelderm, Solution, 1.0% 30 mL (NDC 69489-721-30) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-05-08 Company: Journey Medical Corporation Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.description: Sulconazole Nitrate, Solution, 30 mL (NDC 72143-321-30) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-05-08 Company: Journey Medical Corporation Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug. Manufactured for JG Pharma

item.description: Icatibant Acetate, Injection, 10 mg/1 mL (NDC 63323-574-86) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-05-07 Company: Fresenius Kabi USA, LLC Discontinuation of the manufacturer of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Cisatracurium Besylate Injection (0409-1103-01)
item.description: Cisatracurium Besylate, Injection, 200 mg/20ml (10 mg/mL) Single Dose Vial (NDC 0409-1103-01) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-05-06 Company: Hospira, Inc., a Pfizer Company Supply expected to exhaust late June 2026; Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Cisatracurium Besylate Injection (0409-1208-01)
item.description: Cisatracurium Besylate, Injection, 20 mg/10 mL (2 mg/mL) Multidose Vial (NDC 0409-1208-01) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-05-06 Company: Hospira, Inc., a Pfizer Company Supply expected to exhaust late June 2026; Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.description: Lamotrigine, Tablet, Extended Release, 200 mg (NDC 49884-564-11) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-29 Company: Par Health, Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.description: Lamotrigine, Tablet, Extended Release, 300 mg (NDC 49884-605-11) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-29 Company: Par Health, Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Crinecerfont Capsule (70370-5025-1)
item.description: Crenessity, Capsule, 25 mg (NDC 70370-5025-1) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-28 Company: Neurocrine Biosciences, Inc. Neurocrine is discontinuing only the 25 mg soft gel capsule dose strength (NDC 70370-5025-01). The 50mg and 100mg soft gel capsule dose strength (NDC 70370-5050-1 and 70370-5100-1), and 50 mg/mL oral solution will continue to be marketed (NDC 70370-5250-1).

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Etravirine Tablet (10147-0570-1)
item.description: Etravirine, Tablet, 100 mg (NDC 10147-0570-1) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-28 Company: Janssen Research and Development Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.description: Intelence, Tablet, 100 mg (NDC 59676-570-01) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-28 Company: Janssen Research and Development Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.description: Furosemide, Injection, 10 mg/1 mL (NDC 25021-311-02) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-28 Company: Gland Pharma Limited Distributed by Sagent Pharmaceuticals; Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.description: Furosemide, Injection, 10 mg/1 mL (NDC 25021-311-10) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-28 Company: Gland Pharma Limited Distributed by Sagent Pharmaceuticals; Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Palbociclib Capsule (0069-0187-21)
item.description: Ibrance, Capsule, 75 mg (NDC 0069-0187-21) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-22 Company: Pfizer Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacturing of the capsule presentation. 75 mg Tablet NDC 0069-0284-03 will continue to be manufactured.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Palbociclib Capsule (0069-0188-21)
item.description: Ibrance, Capsule, 100 mg (NDC 0069-0188-21) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-22 Company: Pfizer Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacturing of the capsule presentation. 100 mg Tablet NDC 0069-0486-03 will continue to be manufactured.

item.description: Dexmedetomidine Hydrochloride, Injection, 100 ug/1 mL (NDC 16729-239-93) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-04-21 Company: Accord Healthcare Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Pilocarpine Hydrochloride Ophthalmic Solution (0074-7098-06)
item.description: Vuity, Ophthalmic Solution, 12.5 mg/1 mL (NDC 0074-7098-06) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-03-24 Company: AbbVie Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Pentamidine Isethionate Injection (39822-3050-2)
item.description: Pentamidine Isethionate, Injection, 300 mg/3 mL (NDC 39822-3050-2) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-03-23 Company: XGen Pharmaceuticals DJB, Inc. A business decision was made to discontinue manufacture of the drug.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Ramelteon Tablet (64764-805-10)
item.description: Rozerem, Tablet, 8 mg (NDC 64764-805-10) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-03-19 Company: Takeda Pharmaceuticals USA Inc. Product is expected to be available through February 2027.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Ramelteon Tablet (64764-805-30)
item.description: Rozerem, Tablet, 8 mg (NDC 64764-805-30) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-03-19 Company: Takeda Pharmaceuticals USA Inc. Product is expected to be available through June 2027.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Plerixafor Injection (65219-284-12)
item.description: Plerixafor, Injection, 24 mg per 1.2 mL (20 mg per mL) (NDC 65219-284-12) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-03-13 Company: Fresenius Kabi USA, LLC A business decision was made to discontinue manufacture of the drug.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Peritoneal Dialysis Solution (46163-206-92)
item.description: DELFLEX® w/Dextrose, Solution, 1.5% Low Mg/Low Ca 2L, 5/cs (NDC 46163-206-92) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-03-10 Company: Fresenius Medical Care North America The NDC codes are being discontinued, to be replaced with NDC labeler code #46163.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Peritoneal Dialysis Solution (46163-212-92)
item.description: DELFLEX® w/Dextrose, Solution, 4.25% Low Mg/Low Ca 2L, 5/cs (NDC 46163-212-92) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-03-10 Company: Fresenius Medical Care North America The NDC codes are being discontinued, to be replaced with NDC labeler code #46163.

item.description: DELFLEX® w/Dextrose, Solution, 4.25% Low Mg/Low Ca 2.5L/3L, 5/cs (NDC 46163-212-94) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-03-10 Company: Fresenius Medical Care North America The NDC codes are being discontinued, to be replaced with NDC labeler code #46163.

item.description: DELFLEX® w/Dextrose, Solution, 1.5% Low Mg/Low Ca 2.5L/3L, 5/cs (NDC 49230-206-94) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-03-10 Company: Fresenius Medical Care North America The NDC codes are being discontinued, to be replaced with NDC labeler code #46163.

item.description: DELFLEX® w/Dextrose, Solution, 2.5% Low Mg/Low Ca 2.5L/3L, 5/cs (NDC 49230-209-94) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-03-10 Company: Fresenius Medical Care North America The NDC codes are being discontinued, to be replaced with NDC labeler code #46163.

item.description: Everolimus, Tablet, 2.5 mg (NDC 0093-7766-24) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-03-02 Company: Teva Pharmaceuticals USA, Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug
